title: chamaerops humilis subvar. macrocarpa
intro: Chamaerops humilis subvar. macrocarpa, also known as the fan palm or European fan palm, is a subspecies of the Mediterranean dwarf palm tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Chamaerops humilis subvar. macrocarpa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
